author: y4rr
content: Follow-up from Sprint C.7 (#626). GpuBackend methods: flash_attention_forward_f32/f64. On MPS use MPSGraphTensor scaled dot-product attention or a custom MSL FlashAttention-2 implementation (analogous to the PTX kernel in ferrotorch-gpu P5/#806). Dependency: macOS 14+ for full MPS graph support.
